# Rule: diagnosis_code
# Category: health
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Full redact. ICD-10 codes are debated as direct identifiers; combined
# with dates or ZIP codes they are quasi-identifiers, so the
# conservative default is full redact. Example: J45.20 → [REDACTED].
